designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.

html_data:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
	<title></title>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
	<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width">
	<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">
	<style>

		}

			flex: 1;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
			align-items: center
		}

		.bee-form .bee-form-row .bee-field input:not([type=checkbox]):not([type=radio]) {
			flex-grow: 1;
			font-family: inherit;
			font-size: inherit

		}

		.bee-form input[type=color] {

		.bee-image img {

		}

		.bee-menu .bee-hamburger-controls {
			cursor: pointer;
			display: inline-block;

		}

		.bee-menu .bee-hamburger-controls span {
			display: block;
			position: absolute;
			top: 50%;
			left: 50%;
			background-size: 100%;
			background-repeat: no-repeat;
			transition: .12s ease-in-out
		}

		.bee-menu ul {

		.bee-menu ul.bee-horizontal li {
